questions.question: Describe the main differences between a relational database and a NoSQL database. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Relational databases use structured queries, while NoSQL databases use flexible schema designs.

questions.question: What is the purpose of indexing in a relational database? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Indexing improves query performance by allowing the database to quickly locate specific data.

questions.question: Explain the concept of normalization in database design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Normalization ensures data consistency and reduces data redundancy by avoiding duplicate data entry.
